description: Sector overlay for French banks, fintechs, payment institutions, e-money institutions, crypto-asset service providers, and related financial-service documentation.

metadata.scope: France-only sector overlay controls for Banking and Fintech. Intended to be used with france_core_control_library.
metadata.source_note: Source basis is mapped from official French/EU legal, regulatory, supervisory, and guidance sources available at rule-pack publication time. This starter pack is not legal advice and requires expert validation before production reliance.
metadata.external_knowledge_policy: No external knowledge is introduced during document evaluation. Regulatory source mappings live only in this versioned rule pack.

primary_sources.name: ACPR banking and insurance supervision materials

rules.title: ACPR authorization or regulated-status evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for ACPR authorization, banking licence, payment institution, electronic money institution, agent, or regulated-status evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified France compliance/legal reviewer must confirm applicability, current legal sufficiency, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.
source_basis: ACPR banking and payment supervision materials

rules.title: Customer due diligence and AML/CFT evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for KYC/CDD, beneficial owner, sanctions screening, suspicious-reporting, risk classification, or TRACFIN evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified France compliance/legal reviewer must confirm applicability, current legal sufficiency, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.

rules.title: Crypto-asset provider registration or approval evidence is present where applicable
rules.summary: Checks for PSAN/PSCA registration, AMF registration, ACPR opinion, crypto-asset custody, trading platform, or digital-asset services evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified France compliance/legal reviewer must confirm applicability, current legal sufficiency, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.

rules.title: Financial customer-protection disclosure evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for customer information, complaints, fees, risks, terms, suitability, or financial-product disclosures.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified France compliance/legal reviewer must confirm applicability, current legal sufficiency, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.

rules.title: Financial data privacy and security evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for financial-data protection, privacy notice, GDPR/RGPD, security controls, and processor/client-data safeguards.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified France compliance/legal reviewer must confirm applicability, current legal sufficiency, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.
